description: Spend categories and sub-types that are statutory, regulatory or legally mandatory and therefore non-addressable for cost optimisation purposes. These are hard exclusions applied before any addressability calculation.

non_addressable_categories.reason: Statutory tax obligation under GST Act, Income Tax Act, TDS/TCS provisions
exceptions: gst_itc_recovery lever may recover credits — applies separately to ITC line items

non_addressable_categories.reason: Mandatory under Companies Act 2013 Section 135 for qualifying entities — minimum 2% of average net profit must be spent
exceptions: csr_efficiency lever may improve impact-per-rupee of mandated spend — not a cost reduction

keyword_based_exclusions.reason: Statutory audit requirements under Companies Act — cannot be avoided, only tendered
keyword_based_exclusions.note: 15% addressability retained — competitive tendering at renewal is still possible

keyword_based_exclusions.reason: Statutory employee benefit contributions — non-negotiable under Indian labour law
keyword_based_exclusions.note: No addressability — employer's statutory contribution rates are fixed by law

keyword_based_exclusions.reason: Mandatory insurance under Workmen's Compensation Act and Factories Act
keyword_based_exclusions.note: 10% retained — competitive tendering of mandatory insurance is possible

keyword_based_exclusions.reason: Environmental compliance mandated under Environment Protection Act and CPCB/SPCB regulations
keyword_based_exclusions.note: 5% retained — vendor tendering possible; core compliance spend is non-avoidable

keyword_based_exclusions.reason: Regulatory levies on power tariff — set by state electricity regulatory commission (SERC)
keyword_based_exclusions.note: No addressability — tariff components fixed by regulation

keyword_based_exclusions.reason: Income tax obligations — non-avoidable; only timing of payment may differ
keyword_based_exclusions.note: Tax optimisation is a separate exercise outside procurement/OPEX scope

keyword_based_exclusions.reason: Regulatory filing and listing compliance — mandatory for listed entities
keyword_based_exclusions.note: 10% retained — vendor/platform choice possible; core fees are fixed

keyword_based_exclusions.reason: Statutory retirement and social security contributions
keyword_based_exclusions.note: No addressability — employer contributions are legally mandated

contract_based_exclusions.description: Spend under active contracts with > 18 months remaining and hard minimum purchase commitments receives reduced addressability until the contract window opens.
